positive_contracts_covered: Wave26 loop-profile registry and Wave27 frame-manifest and temporal-evidence reuse
actual Pillow decode and RGBA load of every GIF frame
candidate GIF SHA256, byte count, dimensions, frame count, durations, loop count, and decoded-frame hash binding
deterministic decoded-pixel first-to-last technical seam metric
source-frame artifact hash, byte, dimension, timing, and sequence integrity
synthetic technical verification remains blocked and unpromotable
negative_contracts_covered: missing candidate, invalid container, truncated GIF, and invalid LZW decode
unknown loop taxonomy and tampered source artifacts or sequence binding
frame-count, dimension, duration, zero-duration, and loop-count mismatch
boolean-only runtime or visual proof claims
runtime and visual proof artifact hash or source/candidate binding mismatch
unverified proof records cannot retain readiness or pass subfields
synthetic inputs cannot claim runtime, visual, export, certification, or production pass
production_happy_path_policy: A synthetic fixture must not set runtime, visual, final-export, certification, or production-proof flags true; a genuine production GIF packet is required.
